response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple domains and languages, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platforms or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking systems — both mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to an academic thesis and an early NI LabWindows role, with no indication of domain-specific financial systems work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot programming skills with modern tooling
Demonstrated experience in CI/CD, testing practices, and dev-ops infrastructure
Active open-source contributor with technical communication and teaching ability
concerns: No proven professional C++ experience on Windows in financial systems
Lacks any documented exposure to fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in high-volume financial database environments
